---
title: "ASCII Art"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{ASCII Art}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(collapse = TRUE, comment = "#>", eval = FALSE)
```

ASCII art rescales the source image to a character grid and maps brightness to
character density.

```{r}
library(ImageArtR)
img <- read_art_image(system.file("extdata", "example.png", package = "ImageArtR"))

ascii <- image_ascii_art(img, width = 70)
print_ascii_art(ascii)
write_ascii_art(ascii, "example-ascii.txt")

ascii_plot <- image_ascii_art(img, width = 70, color = TRUE, output = "ggplot")
plot(ascii_plot)
```
